name: Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen, Inc.
description: Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen, Inc. is an American multinational chain of fried chicken fast-food restaurants. Founded in 1972 in New Orleans, Louisiana, the company is renowned for its signature Southern-style fried chicken, biscuits, and Cajun-inspired side dishes. Popeyes has grown into a global brand with thousands of locations worldwide, offering a distinct menu that emphasizes bold, Louisiana-inspired flavors. The company is currently a subsidiary of Restaurant Brands International, which manages its operations and international expansion while maintaining its heritage and commitment to high-quality, hand-battered chicken prepared with traditional culinary techniques.
